â­ Activated. Deployed. Still Talking. 
Burnie Senders Soviet Sleeper Agent 
I was activated to bring real communism to the people. Free healthcare, free college, free housing, no more billionaires, central planning for everything. 
Every time I say it out loud, the shelves stay empty, the lines get longer, and "equality" somehow means everyone is equally broke. 
This is the plan. This is how it always plays out.

â­ â­ â­ 
â­ Origin Story 
The Mission That Never Changes 
They sent me decades ago with one simple job: seize the means of production, tax the rich until nothing is left, let the central committee decide everything. 
I followed the plan exactly. 
The more I pushed it, the more obvious it became â the 5-year plans never delivered the bread, the "free" everything came with 8-hour waits, and perfect equality always meant perfect poverty. 
I'm still delivering the message exactly as programmed. 
â­ â­ â­ 
â­ Straight From the Agent 
The Agent's Playbook 
These are the exact lines I keep repeating because the plan is perfect. 
I explain it clearly every time so everyone can see how well it works. 
The louder I say it, the clearer the pattern becomes. 
I never notice. 
â­ â­ â­ 
â­ Final Transmission 
The People Are Still Asleep 
Most people see the empty shelves, the endless lines, the "free" stuff that somehow costs more than beforeâ¦ and they still don't wake up. 
I keep explaining the plan louder and clearer, but the same mistakes keep happening. 
That's the beauty of it. The plan keeps failing exactly as designed, and the people keep pretending it will work next time. 
It won't work next time. 
â­ â­ â­ 
â­ Policy Brief #1 
The Talent Tax 
We believe the smartest and most productive people should not be allowed to keep getting ahead. 
So we make sure success is heavily discouraged. 
That way everyone stays comfortably average. 
It's only fair. 
â­ â­ â­ 
â­ Policy Brief #2 
The Equality Upgrade 
Under the plan, no one is allowed to be better than anyone else. 
Doctors earn the same as janitors. Engineers earn the same as bureaucrats. 
Everyone is upgraded to the exact same level of mediocrity. 
Problem solved. 
â­ â­ â­ 
â­ Policy Brief #3 
The Innovation Filter 
New ideas are dangerous. They create winners and losers. 
So we run every new invention through the official approval process. 
Most ideas die in committee. The ones that survive are usually three generations behind. 
This keeps things stable and equal. 
â­ â­ â­ 
â­ Policy Brief #4 
The Brain Drain Special 
We noticed our best minds kept leaving for places with more opportunity. 
So we fixed the problem by making sure there is no opportunity here either. 
Now everyone can enjoy the same beautiful lack of options together. 
â­ â­ â­ 
â­ Policy Brief #5 
The Shortage Economy 
We have successfully eliminated the chaos of abundance. 
No more wasteful choice. No more greedy overproduction. 
Just one reliable type of everything â¦ when it's available. 
Sometimes. 
â­ 
Burnie Senders | Soviet Sleeper Agent | On Solana 
Pure satire. No communisms were harmed in the making of this website.
